name: Bold Metric
description: Full-screen statistic card with oversized number, optional background image, contextual label, and source attribution for data-driven storytelling.
author: slide-cli

slots.label: Eyebrow label
slots.description: Short uppercase tag above the metric. 1–4 words. E.g. 'Industry Report' or 'Since 2020'.

slots.label: Metric / number
slots.description: The hero number or statistic. Keep to 1–5 characters for maximum impact. E.g. '73%', '$4.2T', '10×'.

slots.label: Context line
slots.description: One sentence explaining what the metric means. 4–12 words. Displayed directly below the number.

slots.label: Detail paragraph
slots.description: Optional elaboration. 1–2 sentences providing nuance, comparison, or implication.

slots.label: Source attribution
slots.description: Data source shown at bottom. E.g. 'McKinsey, 2024' or 'Based on 12,000 respondents'.

slots.label: Background image
slots.description: Optional background photo or image. Covered with a dark gradient scrim so text remains legible. Local path, URL, or data URI.

slots.label: Background color
slots.description: Slide background color. Used as the base when no bg-image is set, and as the scrim tint color when an image is present.

slots.label: Accent color
slots.description: Color for the metric number, decorative rule, and eyebrow. Vivid saturated colors create the most contrast.

slots.label: Text color
slots.description: Color for context, detail, and secondary text. Warm whites on dark backgrounds.
